items.title: Symphony-style local work item ledger
items.objective: Adopt the safe parts of Symphony by tracking work as validated work items without automatic VM or main-live actions.
items.rollback: revert the harness workflow, ledger, checker, test, task, and docs changes

items.title: MR PAPER follow-up report after samples appear
items.objective: When MR PAPER entries exist, summarize TP/SL/TIMEOUT by rank and trigger quality before any promotion decision.
items.proof: MR PAPER summary with nonzero sample counts and trade validation

items.title: Register current_spec as work item
items.objective: Add a safe command that can turn docs/ai_harness/current_spec.md into a tracked work item without touching VM or main-live behavior.
items.rollback: revert the add-from-spec command and related docs/tests

items.title: Pattern candidate suppression decision
items.objective: Decide whether pattern_stage=CANDIDATE should be suppressed after enough samples are collected.
items.proof: feature-level report with n>=20 and shadow-only validation

items.title: AI harness index page and status update command
items.objective: Add a local index page for the AI harness docs and a safe command to update work item status without editing JSON by hand.
items.rollback: revert the index page and status update command changes
